name: provider-multi-baseurl-routing
title: Upgrade provider multi-baseurl routing and ping UX
description: Upgrade provider multi-baseURL routing/ping management and add alias bound-target ordering controls so users can adjust deterministic failover priority from the UI.
creator: OpenCode
notes: Added PRD and implemented alias target ordering on top of existing ordered alias target arrays. Backend now validates exact target-set reorder requests, preserves enabled state, persists slice order, and exposes service/Wails/HTTP APIs. Frontend alias detail target cards now show order index plus up/down and drag/drop controls with i18n text. Verified with `go test ./...` and `npm run build`.

acceptance: disabled target state preserved during reorder
Wails and fallback HTTP expose reorder endpoint
English and zh-CN UI labels added
